Profile Overview

Who is Ibrahim Al-jeddawi?

Professional Summary

A highly motivated Computer Science & Information Technology graduate with a strong academic record and a proven track record of developing impactful applications. Demonstrates robust full-stack development capabilities across mobile, desktop, and web environments using Flutter, C#, Django, and React.

Combines solid programming expertise with practical knowledge in network administration, system configuration, and MikroTik RouterOS. Adept at transforming complex requirements into clean, efficient code and eager to contribute to a forward-thinking development team.

Location Ibb, Yemen
Degree Bachelor in CS & IT

Soft Skills & Capabilities

Complex Problem Solving

Critical thinking and complex software troubleshooting capabilities.

Rapid Tech Adaptation

Exceptional self-learning agility to acquire new frameworks and architectures quickly.

Agile Collaboration

Effective, dynamic team integration and clear engineering communications.

Portfolio Projects

Featured Engineering Work

Demonstrating end-to-end full stack execution and practical networking integrations.

Graduation Project 2024-2025

"Surfey" Social Platform

A robust, comprehensive social web platform built specifically for researchers and public institutes to design dynamic surveys, gather massive public opinions, and compile real-time structural analysis of data.

Django (Back-end) React + TS (Front-end) REST APIs PostgreSQL
97% Grade Academic Excellence
Multimedia Streaming Live

"Estraha View" Platform

A localized media hosting and high-bandwidth streaming portal engineered for network operators. Allows hosters to store and stream high-definition movies, series, and local files directly to network clients seamlessly.

Django Django Templates Tailwindcss
Network Local Engine
Financial Tech Mobile App

"Byasak" Ledger App

A clean, minimalist mobile application for tracking private personal transactions, debt relationships, and rapid billing updates. It serves as an intuitive localized mobile ledger.

Flutter Dart SQLite Offline First Architecture
Android & iOS Ready
ISP Automation Mobile App

Wi-Fi Card Sales System

An essential utility app engineered for local Wi-Fi provider hubs. Automatically tracks, inventories, issues, and audits card codes and subscriptions distributed on localized sub-networks.

Flutter Dart
Operations Automation
